case_title: HSBC BANK NEVADA N.A. VS. CARLOS A CRUZ

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK NEVADA N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, CARLOS A SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-10-2010
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 395 VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OF HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK NEVADA N.A.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE CARLOS A CRUZ FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK NEVADA N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-14-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: WINN, BRIAN N SUBSTITUTED FOR JACOBS, KURTISS A AS ATTORNEY FOR HSBC BANK NEVADA N.A.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-14-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
